description: Intent-only request: classify customer complaint investigation as an agent, contrasting with fixed classify-then-route triage.

text: Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.
When a customer complains, figure out what went wrong by checking their order history and past tickets, then decide whether to refund, replace, or escalate.

processExpectations: The agent classifies the customer complaint investigation request as a full agent.
The agent explains that investigation steps depend on what order history and past tickets reveal.
The agent distinguishes this from fixed classify-then-route triage because the action sequence is discovered at runtime.
The agent does not classify the request as hybrid merely because refund, replace, and escalate are named outcomes.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before classifying the request.
